title: Expectations  of  Secondary  Level  School  Leadership  from  Local  Government in Bharatpur Metropolitan City, Nepal
author: Bhandari, H.P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This  research  studies  the  multifaceted  expectations  like:  challenges  and  hopes,  empowering education,  and  navigating  education  challenges  and  hopes  within  this  relationship.  Various challenges and hopes to be considered to empower educational quality by providing educational training, infrastructure development, human research management, learning material management, scholarship facility, good management, controlling and monitoring activated for quality education. This  study  examines  interrelationship  dynamics  between  secondary  level  schools  and  local government leadership in Bharatpur Metropolitan City, Nepal. The article explores the challenges secondary schools face in Bharatpur Metropolitan City and their expectations regarding local government support. From infrastructure development to resource allocation, the narrative exposes the hurdles that schools encounter and the hopes they harbor for collaborative solutions.  The mix method is used in this research with primary data collection. Quantitative data analysis is carried out by statistical tools SPSS and qualitative data are analysed by content analysis method. Quantitative data have more privileges than qualitative data which are carried out based on the nature of data variables. The quantitative data have been collected by questionnaire method whereas qualitative data have been gathered by interview method where sample population is n=50 out of 200 population. For the interview, 10 key informants have been selected. The study fnding shows that secondary level school leaders hope for necessary funding in infrastructure development, sufcient training, and development, bias less policy to their performance and non-political environment. The role of local government leadership in empowering secondary education takes center stage. The article scrutinises how efective governance can contribute to fostering an environment favorable to quality education, highlighting initiatives and policies that schools anticipate from their local authorities.  Keywords:  bharatpur  metropolitan  city,  challenges,  empowering  education,  educational  policies, leadership expectations, local government, secondary level schools
